steps: Step 1: Pat chicken thighs dry with paper towels and season generously with salt and pepper on both sides.
Step 2: Heat olive oil in a large skillet or oven-safe pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken thighs and sear for 4-5 minutes per side, until golden brown. Remove chicken from the pan and set aside.
Step 3: Reduce heat to medium. Add minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute until fragrant, stirring constantly.
Step 4: Whisk in the Dijon mustard and chicken broth, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Bring the sauce to a gentle simmer.
Step 5: Stir in the fresh thyme. If using, whisk in the heavy cream until well combined.

Step 6: Return the seared chicken thighs to the pan, nestling them into the sauce. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Step 7: Taste the sauce and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot, spooning extra sauce over the chicken.

recipes.title: Baked eggplant with tomatoes and mozzarella
ingredients: 8 ounces fresh mozzarella, sliced or shredded
3 tablespoons olive oil, plus more for greasing
1 teaspoon salt, plus more for eggplant
steps: Slice eggplants into 1/4-inch thick rounds. Lay them on paper towels, sprinkle generously with salt, and let sit for 30 minutes to draw out moisture. Pat dry thoroughly with paper towels.

Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Brush eggplant slices lightly with olive oil and arrange them in a single layer on baking sheets. Bake for 15-20 minutes, flipping halfway, until tender and lightly golden. Alternatively, pan-fry in batches until golden.

While eggplant bakes, prepare the tomato sauce. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add minced garlic and dried oregano, cook for 1 minute until fragrant.

Stir in the crushed tomatoes, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat and cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens slightly. Stir in chopped fresh basil.

Lightly grease a 9x13 inch baking dish. Spread a thin layer of tomato sauce on the bottom. Arrange a single layer of baked eggplant slices over the sauce. Top with a layer of mozzarella cheese and a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese (if using).
Repeat layers: sauce, eggplant, mozzarella, and Parmesan, ending with a final layer of sauce and mozzarella on top. Sprinkle with any remaining Parmesan.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted, bubbly, and lightly golden brown. Let rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Salmon fish cake
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
recipes.descriptionPreview: Get the perfect recipe for salmon fishcakes with a twist! Our easy-to-follow steps and simple ingredients will guide you to creating a mouthwatering dish that's both healthy and delicious. Try our Wholesome Salmon Fishcakes with Citrus Fennel Salad Recipe today!
steps: Step 1: Boil the diced potatoes in salted water until very tender, about 15-20 minutes. Drain well and mash until smooth. Set aside to cool slightly.
Step 2: In a large bowl, combine the flaked salmon, mashed potatoes, beaten egg, chopped dill, chopped parsley, lemon zest, 1/2 cup breadcrumbs, salt, and pepper. Mix gently until just combined.
Step 3: Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions and shape each into a flat, round cake.
Step 4: Place the remaining 1/2 cup breadcrumbs on a shallow plate. Coat each fish cake thoroughly with breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Step 5: Heat the olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Step 6: Carefully place the fish cakes in the hot skillet, ensuring not to overcrowd. Cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until golden brown and heated through. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Banana cheese cake
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Lightly grease a 9-inch springform pan.

Step 2: In a medium bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup sugar, and melted butter. Press mixture evenly into the bottom of the prepared springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
Step 3: Reduce oven temperature to 325°F (160°C).
Step 4: In a large bowl, beat softened cream cheese with an electric mixer until smooth. Gradually add 1 1/4 cups sugar and flour, beating until well combined.
Step 5: Beat in vanilla extract and cinnamon. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition until just combined. Stir in sour cream.
Step 6: In a separate small bowl, mash the ripe bananas and stir in lemon juice to prevent browning. Gently fold the mashed bananas into the cream cheese mixture.
Step 7: Pour the banana cream cheese filling over the cooled crust in the springform pan.

Step 8: Place the springform pan on a baking sheet. Bake for 60-70 minutes, or until the edges are set but the center still jiggles slightly. (Optional: For a creamier cheesecake, bake in a water bath).
Step 9: Turn off the oven, crack the door open, and let the cheesecake cool in the oven for 1 hour. This helps prevent cracking.

Step 10: Remove from oven, run a knife around the edge of the pan, and let cool completely on a wire rack. Once cool, cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight, before serving.

recipes.title: Rustic rosemary chicken
ingredients: 1 whole chicken (3-4 lbs), cut into 8 pieces or 8 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs/drumsticks
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
recipes.descriptionPreview: Get a delicious and easy Italian chicken recipe that's perfect for a weeknight dinner. This rustic chicken dish features bone-in chicken thighs, carrots, and onions slow-cooked in a flavorful pan with rosemary and olive oil.
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Step 2: In a large bowl, combine the chicken pieces, chopped rosemary, minced garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Step 3: Add the quartered potatoes and onion wedges to the bowl with the chicken and toss to combine.
Step 4: Arrange the chicken and vegetables in a single layer on a large baking sheet or in a roasting pan. Place lemon slices among the chicken.

Step 5: Roast for 45-55 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through (internal temperature reaches 165°F/74°C) and the skin is golden brown and crispy. Flip potatoes halfway through if desired for even browning.
Step 6: Remove from oven and let rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Sweet potato black beans
ingredients: 2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and diced into 1/2-inch cubes
1 (15-ounce) can black beans, rinsed and drained
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
2 tablespoons fresh cilantro, chopped (optional, for garnish)
1 lime, cut into wedges (optional, for serving)
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
recipes.descriptionPreview: Elevate your weeknight dinner routine with this easy-to-follow recipe guide. Discover the joy of cooking one pot meals that are not only delicious but also healthier and more convenient. From scratch to table, explore the simple steps to a perfect mealtime experience.
steps: Step 1: Heat olive oil in a large skillet or pot over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5-7 minutes.
Step 2: Add the minced garlic, ground cumin, chili powder, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper (if using). Cook for 1 minute more, stirring constantly, until fragrant.
Step 3: Stir in the diced sweet potatoes. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they start to soften slightly.
Step 4: Add the rinsed and drained black beans and vegetable broth (or water). Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Step 5: Remove from heat. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Step 6: Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice, if desired.

recipes.title: Charcutera slider
ingredients: 1 brie wheel, sliced WHEN COLD TO MAKE IT EASIER
steps: Halve bread rolls and remove top.
Dress arugula with olive oil and flakey salt.

recipes.title: Butternut squash soup
ingredients: 1/2 cup heavy cream or full-fat coconut milk (optional)
1/2 tsp black pepper, or to taste
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Carefully cut the butternut squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds. Drizzle the cut sides with 1 tbsp olive oil, season with a pinch of salt and pepper. Place cut-side down on a baking sheet.
Roast the squash for 30-40 minutes, or until very tender when pierced with a fork.
While the squash roasts, heat the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and dried sage (if using) to the pot and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Once the squash is roasted and cool enough to handle, scoop the flesh out of the skin and add it to the pot with the onions and garlic.
Pour in the vegetable broth. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat and let it cook for 10-15 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Carefully transfer the soup in batches to a blender and blend until completely smooth, or use an immersion blender directly in the pot. Be cautious when blending hot liquids.
Return the blended soup to the pot (if using a regular blender). Stir in the heavy cream or coconut milk (if using). Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
Heat the soup gently over low heat until warmed through, but do not boil. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Butter bean Aubergine spinach
ingredients: 2 (400g) cans butter beans, drained and rinsed
Salt and black pepper to taste
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot or deep pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook for 5-7 minutes until softened and translucent.
Add the minced garlic, ground cumin, smoked paprika, and turmeric to the pan. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly, until fragrant.
Stir in the diced aubergine. Sauté for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the aubergine starts to soften and lightly brown.
Pour in the canned chopped tomatoes and vegetable stock. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook for 15 minutes, or until the aubergine is tender.
Add the drained and rinsed butter beans to the pot. Stir well and cook for another 5 minutes to heat the beans through.
Stir in the fresh spinach in batches, allowing each batch to wilt before adding more, until all the spinach has wilted into the stew.
Season generously with salt and black pepper to taste. Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh chopped coriander.

recipes.title: Apple roses pastries
ingredients: 1 tablespoon unsalted butter, melted (for greasing muffin tin)
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
recipes.descriptionPreview: Get the secrets to making breathtaking Apple Roses at home with this easy recipe. Using a premade puff pastry dough, you'll create a flaky crust and tender saucy apples that are sure to impress. Perfect for fall, this dessert is quick to make and looks beautiful on any table. Try
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a 6-cup muffin tin with melted butter.

Core and thinly slice the apples (about 1/8 inch thick). Place apple slices in a microwave-safe bowl with the lemon juice and a splash of water. Microwave for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly softened and pliable. Drain any excess liquid.
In a small bowl, combine the apricot jam with 1-2 tablespoons of water. Microwave for 30 seconds to thin the jam, then stir until smooth.
Unroll the puff pastry sheet onto a lightly floured surface. Cut the pastry into 6 equal strips, each about 2 inches wide.
Spread a thin layer of the thinned apricot jam mixture over each pastry strip.

Arrange the softened apple slices along one long edge of each pastry strip, slightly overlapping each other, with the skin side of the apples peeking out over the top edge of the pastry. If desired, sprinkle with ground cinnamon.
Fold the bottom half of the pastry strip up over the bottom edge of the apple slices. Carefully roll the pastry strip from one end to the other to form a rose shape.
Place each apple rose into a greased muffin tin cup.
Bake for 35-45 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and puffed, and the apples are tender. If the tops start to brown too quickly, you can loosely cover them with foil.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the muffin tin for 5-10 minutes before carefully transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.

recipes.title: Chocolate banana brownies
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour an 8x8 inch (20x20 cm) baking pan, or line with parchment paper.
Step 2: In a large bowl, mash the ripe bananas until mostly smooth. Set aside.
Step 3: In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the melted butter and granulated sugar until well combined.
Step 4: Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract and the mashed bananas until fully incorporated.
Step 5: In another bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt.
Step 6: Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mixing until just combined. Do not overmix.
Step 7: Fold in the chocolate chips, if using.
Step 8: Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan and spread evenly.
Step 9: Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with moist crumbs, but not wet batter.
Step 10: Let the brownies cool completely in the pan on a wire rack before cutting into squares and serving.

recipes.title: Bun Cha
ingredients: 300g pork belly or shoulder, thinly sliced
4 cloves garlic, minced, divided (for pork marinade)
1 tbsp finely chopped spring onion (white part)
2 tbsp neutral oil, divided (for grilling and pork slice marinade)
steps: Step 1: Prepare Pickled Vegetables. In a small bowl, combine julienned daikon and carrot with 1 tbsp sugar, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, and 1/2 tsp salt. Mix well and set aside for at least 30 minutes.

Step 2: Marinate Pork. For patties: In a bowl, combine ground pork with 2 tbsp fish sauce, 1 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp black pepper, 2 minced garlic cloves, 1 minced shallot, and 1 tbsp chopped spring onion. Mix well and form into small patties (about 1.5-2 inches diameter). For slices: In another bowl, combine sliced pork with 2 tbsp fish sauce, 1 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp black pepper, 2 minced garlic cloves, 1 minced shallot, and 1 tbsp neutral oil. Mix well. Marinate both pork types for at least 30 minutes, or preferably 1-2 hours in the refrigerator.

Step 3: Make Dipping Sauce (Nuoc Cham). In a small saucepan, combine 1/2 cup water, 1/4 cup fish sauce, 1/4 cup rice vinegar, and 3 tbsp sugar. Heat gently, stirring until sugar dissolves. Let cool. Once cool, stir in 2 minced garlic cloves, sliced chilies (if using), and lime juice (if using).

Step 4: Cook Vermicelli Noodles. Cook dried rice vermicelli noodles according to package instructions (usually boil for 3-5 minutes, then drain and rinse with cold water to prevent sticking). Set aside.

Step 5: Grill Pork. Heat a grill pan or outdoor grill over medium-high heat. Lightly brush with the remaining 1 tbsp neutral oil. Grill pork patties and sliced pork until cooked through and nicely charred, turning occasionally. This usually takes 3-5 minutes per side for patties and less for slices.

Step 6: Assemble Bun Cha. Arrange cooked vermicelli noodles, grilled pork patties, grilled pork slices, fresh herbs (lettuce, mint, cilantro, perilla), bean sprouts, and pickled daikon/carrot on a platter. Serve with the dipping sauce (Nuoc Cham) on the side, or pour a small amount over the noodles and pork in individual bowls.

recipes.title: Chicken satay skewers
ingredients: 1.5 lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
12-15 wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
recipes.descriptionPreview: Learn the simple recipe for chicken satay skewers with chilli courgette, a quick and easy dish that's perfect for busy lives. With a delicious marinade and a side of chilli courgette, this recipe is a must-try for anyone looking for a healthy and flavorful meal option.
steps: Step 1: Cut chicken into 1-inch pieces. In a medium bowl, combine 1 tbsp soy sauce, fish sauce, 1 tbsp brown sugar, curry powder, cumin, coriander, turmeric, 2 cloves minced garlic, 1 inch grated ginger, and 1 tbsp vegetable oil. Add chicken, toss to coat, cover, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 4 hours.
Step 2: While chicken marinates, soak wooden skewers in water for at least 30 minutes to prevent burning.

Step 3: Prepare the peanut sauce: In a separate bowl, whisk together peanut butter, 1/4 cup soy sauce, lime juice, 2 tbsp brown sugar, rice vinegar, sriracha (if using), 1 clove minced garlic, 1/2 inch grated ginger, and coconut milk until smooth. Add more coconut milk or a little water if needed to reach desired consistency. Set aside.
Step 4: Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the soaked skewers.
Step 5: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat, or preheat broiler, or heat a large skillet/grill pan over medium-high heat.
Step 6: Grill, broil, or pan-fry the chicken skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, turning occasionally, until cooked through and lightly charred.
Step 7: Serve the chicken satay skewers hot with the prepared peanut sauce for dipping.

recipes.title: Sweet potato waffles
ingredients: ¼ cup packed light brown sugar
steps: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, ground cinnamon, and brown sugar.
In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the mashed cooked sweet potato, eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla extract until well combined.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Be careful not to overmix; a few lumps are okay.
Preheat your waffle iron according to the manufacturer's instructions. Lightly grease if necessary.
Pour about ½ to ¾ cup of batter onto the hot waffle iron (or as much as recommended for your specific iron).
Cook for 3-5 minutes, or until the waffles are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the cooked waffle and repeat with the remaining batter. Serve immediately with desired toppings.

recipes.title: Watermelon salad
ingredients: Watermelon  400 g (2 slices about 5 cm thick)
Red onion  half an onion (sliced into half-rings)
steps: Cut 2 slices of watermelon, each about 5 cm thick.
In a bowl, mix arugula, crumbled feta cheese, torn dill, red onion, cucumber, lime juice, salt, and olive oil. Stir well.
Place the mixture on top of the watermelon slices.
Optionally, drizzle with honey and sprinkle with red pepper flakes.

recipes.title: Raspberry Greek yogurt whipped
ingredients: 2 tablespoons honey (or maple syrup), to taste
steps: If using frozen raspberries, allow them to thaw slightly for about 10-15 minutes.
In a food processor or blender, combine the thawed raspberries, Greek yogurt, honey, and vanilla extract.
Blend on high speed until the mixture is completely smooth and creamy, about 1-2 minutes. Scrape down the sides of the blender as needed.
Continue blending for another 30-60 seconds to incorporate air, creating a light and "whipped" texture.
Taste the mixture and add more honey if you prefer a sweeter taste.
Pour the Raspberry Greek yogurt whipped into individual serving dishes or glasses.
Serve immediately for a soft, airy texture, or chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes for a firmer, cooler treat. Garnish with fresh raspberries if desired.

recipes.title: Swahili beef and rice
ingredients: 1.5 lbs beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
steps: Step 1: Heat vegetable oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until deeply golden brown and caramelized, about 10-15 minutes.
Step 2: Add the minced garlic, grated ginger, and green chilies (if using) to the pot. Sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Step 3: Add the beef cubes to the pot and brown them on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Step 4: Stir in the pilau masala, turmeric powder, and salt. Cook for 2-3 minutes, allowing the spices to toast.
Step 5: Add the diced tomatoes to the pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the tomatoes soften and release their juices, about 5-7 minutes.
Step 6: Pour in 2 cups of beef broth or water. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for 45-60 minutes, or until the beef is tender.

Step 7: Once the beef is tender, add the rinsed Basmati rice to the pot, spreading it evenly over the beef and sauce. Pour in the remaining 2 cups of beef broth or water (or according to your rice package instructions for 2 cups of rice).

Step 8: Bring the liquid to a boil, then immediately reduce the heat to the lowest setting. Cover the pot tightly and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until all the liquid is absorbed and the rice is cooked through.
Step 9: Turn off the heat and let the pot rest, covered, for another 5-10 minutes. This allows the rice to steam and become fluffy.
Step 10: Fluff the Swahili beef and rice gently with a fork. Garnish with fresh chopped cilantro, if desired, and serve hot.

recipes.title: Hueva a la flamenca
ingredients: 300g fish roe (hueva), fresh or lightly cured
steps: If using fresh fish roe, gently rinse and pat dry. If using cured roe, slice it into 1/2-inch thick pieces.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, diced red bell pepper, and green bell pepper. Sauté for 5-7 minutes until softened.
Add the diced serrano ham (if using) and sweet paprika to the skillet. Cook for another 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Pour in the crushed tomatoes and dry white wine (if using). Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the frozen peas (if using) and season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste. Keep warm.

While the sauce simmers, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a separate non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Gently pan-fry the fish roe for 2-3 minutes per side, until lightly golden and cooked through. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan (or a clean one), fry or poach the 4 eggs to your desired doneness.
To serve, spoon a generous amount of the "flamenca" sauce onto plates. Top with the pan-fried fish roe and a fried or poached egg. Garnish with fresh chopped parsley.

recipes.title: Chocolate mousse
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
recipes.descriptionPreview: 264K likes, 2,052 comments - lindsay.keosayian on March 9, 2024: "3-INGREDIENT CHOCOLATE MOUSSE   Simple to make, creamy in texture and absolutely delicious! Perfect for your next high protein snack! IB: @wellnesswsandra
steps: Step 1: Melt the chopped dark chocolate in a heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water (bain-marie) or in a microwave in 30-second intervals, stirring until smooth. Let cool slightly.
Step 2: In a medium bowl, whisk the egg yolks with 2 tablespoons of the granulated sugar until light and creamy. Stir in the vanilla extract.
Step 3: Gradually fold the slightly cooled melted chocolate into the egg yolk mixture until well combined.
Step 4: In a separate large bowl, whip the heavy cream until soft peaks form. Gently fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture until just combined.

Step 5: In another clean large bowl, using an electric mixer, beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until foamy. Gradually add the remaining 2 tablespoons of granulated sugar and continue beating until stiff, glossy peaks form.

Step 6: Gently fold about one-third of the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture to lighten it. Then, carefully fold in the remaining egg whites until no streaks remain, being careful not to deflate the mixture.
Step 7: Divide the mousse among serving glasses or a large bowl. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2-4 hours, or until set.

recipes.title: Banana pancakes
ingredients: 1 tbsp butter or oil, for cooking
recipes.notes: Ingredients not detected automatically.
recipes.descriptionPreview: Get the secret to making fluffy and healthy pancakes with a simple recipe that requires only 4 ingredients. Say goodbye to boring breakfasts and hello to a delicious, guilt-free morning treat. Explore the recipe, tips, and tricks to make this breakfast staple a reality.
steps: In a medium bowl, mash the ripe bananas with a fork until mostly smooth with a few small lumps.
Add the egg, milk, sugar (if using), and vanilla extract (if using) to the mashed bananas. Whisk until well combined.
In a separate large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients. Stir gently with a spoon or spatula until just combined. Do not overmix; a few lumps are fine.
Heat a lightly greased non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake onto the hot pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until bubbles form on the surface and the edges look set.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Serve immediately with your favorite toppings like maple syrup, fresh fruit, or whipped cream.

recipes.title: Greek style lemon potatoes
ingredients: 2.5 lbs Yukon Gold or Russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1.5-inch wedges
1/2 tsp black pepper, or to taste

recipes.descriptionPreview: Discover the secret to making mouth-watering Greek-style lemon potatoes that are sure to become a family favorite. This simple recipe uses just a few ingredients and is perfect for any occasion. With its crispy exterior and tender interior, these potatoes are a game-changer for a
steps: Step 1: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C).
Step 2: In a large bowl, combine the potato wedges, olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper. Toss well to ensure all potatoes are evenly coated.
Step 3: Arrange the seasoned potato wedges in a single layer in a large baking dish (a 9x13 inch dish works well).
Step 4: Pour the vegetable or chicken broth evenly over the potatoes in the baking dish.
Step 5: Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork and beautifully golden brown. Flip the potatoes halfway through baking to ensure even browning.

recipes.title: Chicken clay pot
steps: slices ginger
cloves garlic
g carrot slices
g cabbage Shimeji mushrooms Shiitake mushrooms
spoon salt
spoon sesame oil Chopped green onion
Marinate chicken with garlic, soy sauces, oyster sauce, and pepper for 20 mins.
Heat oil in a donabe, add ginger and garlic, then stir-fry carrots, cabbage, and mushrooms. Add chicken, cover, and simmer on low heat for 25 mins.

recipes.title: Chicken with leaks and butter beans
steps: tbsp capers
/2-1 garlic clove dash of cider vinegar squeeze of lemon olive oil salt
Fry the chicken breasts skin side down in a little oil until golden and remove from the pan.
Add the leeks to the pan and soften, add the garlic and a couple of minutes later the butter beans, miso and 300ml stock.
Stir well and nestle the chicken back in with the skin poking out. Simmer for about 6-8 mins until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened a bit.
Rest the breast for a couple of minutes and slice.
For the salsa verde finely dice the parsley and capers, grate the garlic and mix together with the vinegar, lemon juice, a pinch of salt and enough olive oil so it pours off a spoon.
Serve the beans in a shallow bowl, top with the chicken and drizzle over the salsa verde.

recipes.title: Crispy chicken with butterbeans and leeks
ingredients: 1 stock cube dissolved in 100ml boiling water
steps: Preheat the oven to 200C (fan).

Heat a glug of olive oil in an ovenproof casserole or frying pan. Place the chicken in the pan skin side down and cook for about 5 minutes until the skin is crisp. Turn and cook on the second side for about 1 minute to seal, then transfer to a plate.
Add the diced leeks to the rendered chicken fat and cook until soft, about 3 to 4 minutes.
Stir in the butter beans, prepared stock, and white wine. Bring everything to a simmer.
Add the spinach, cover for a few minutes to wilt, then stir in the basil leaves.
Return the chicken to the pan skin side up, drizzle with a little more olive oil, season the skin with flaky salt, and bake for 25 minutes.

recipes.title: Katsudon
ingredients: 2 boneless pork loin cutlets (about 1/2 inch thick, 4-5 oz each)
Salt and black pepper to taste
Optional: chopped scallions or nori for garnish
steps: Step 1: Prepare the tonkatsu. Pound pork cutlets to an even 1/2-inch thickness. Season both sides with salt and black pepper. Dredge each cutlet in flour, shaking off excess, then dip in the beaten egg, and finally coat thoroughly with panko breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.

Step 2: Fry the tonkatsu. Heat vegetable oil in a deep pot or Dutch oven to 340-350°F (170-175°C). Carefully place the breaded pork cutlets into the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through. Remove and drain on a wire rack lined with paper towels. Once slightly cooled, slice each tonkatsu into 1-inch wide strips.

Step 3: Prepare the sauce. In a small skillet or donburi pan (about 6-8 inches in diameter), combine the dashi stock, soy sauce, mirin, and sugar. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer over medium heat.
Step 4: Cook the onion. Add the thinly sliced onion to the simmering sauce and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the onion softens.
Step 5: Assemble the katsudon. Arrange the sliced tonkatsu strips over the softened onions in the sauce. Pour the lightly beaten eggs evenly over the tonkatsu and onions.
Step 6: Finish cooking. Cover the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until the egg is set to your desired doneness (some prefer it slightly runny, others fully cooked).
Step 7: Serve. Slide the katsudon mixture directly over a bowl of hot cooked short-grain rice. Garnish with chopped scallions or shredded nori, if desired, and serve immediately.
recipes.notes: Caption lists ingredients for katsudon; steps still need transcription from the video.

recipes.title: Coconut chicken bake
ingredients: 1.5 lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped, for garnish
1 lime, cut into wedges, for serving
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Season the chicken pieces with salt and black pepper.
Step 2: Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sliced bell peppers and cook for 5-7 minutes until softened.
Step 3: Add the minced garlic, grated ginger, and curry powder to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly, until fragrant.
Step 4: Add the seasoned chicken pieces to the skillet and cook for 3-5 minutes, browning lightly on all sides.
Step 5: Pour in the full-fat coconut milk. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, stirring to combine all ingredients.
Step 6: Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Step 7: Carefully remove the skillet from the oven. If using, stir in the fresh spinach until it wilts, about 1-2 minutes.
Step 8: Garnish with fresh chopped cilantro and serve immediately with lime wedges. Great with rice or naan.

recipes.title: Blueberry yogurt cake
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9-inch round cake pan or an 8x8 inch square pan.
Step 2: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Step 3: In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the eggs, yogurt, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract until well combined.
Step 4: Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix with a spatula or spoon until just combined. Be careful not to overmix.
Step 5: Gently fold in the blueberries.
Step 6: Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and spread evenly.
Step 7: Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until a wooden skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
Step 8: Let the cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes before inverting it onto a wire rack to cool completely.

recipes.title: Orange cake
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9-inch round cake pan.
Step 2: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
Step 3: In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
Step 4: Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract, orange juice, and orange zest.
Step 5: Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, alternating with the milk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Step 6: Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and spread evenly.
Step 7: Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a wooden skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
Step 8: Let the cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes before inverting it onto a wire rack to cool completely.

recipes.title: Persimmon dessert
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Step 2: Wash persimmons thoroughly. Slice each persimmon in half horizontally or vertically, depending on preference. You can leave the skin on or peel them. Remove any seeds.
Step 3: Arrange the persimmon halves cut-side up in a small baking dish.
Step 4: In a small bowl, combine the melted butter, brown sugar, ground cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix well.
Step 5: Spoon the butter-sugar mixture evenly over the cut surfaces of the persimmons. If using, sprinkle with chopped walnuts.
Step 6: Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the persimmons are tender and the topping is bubbly and slightly caramelized.
Step 7: Serve warm.

recipes.title: Baked sardine in white wine tomato sauce
ingredients: 3 (4.25 ounce / 120g) cans sardines in olive oil, drained
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Step 2: Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Step 3: Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant, being careful not to burn it.
Step 4: Pour in the white wine and bring to a simmer, allowing it to reduce by half, about 3-5 minutes.
Step 5: Stir in the crushed tomatoes, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper. Bring the sauce to a gentle simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Step 6: While the sauce simmers, arrange the drained sardines in a single layer in an oven-safe baking dish.
Step 7: Pour the tomato sauce evenly over the sardines in the baking dish.
Step 8: Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the sauce is bubbly and the sardines are heated through.
Step 9: Remove from oven, garnish with fresh chopped parsley, and serve hot with crusty bread or pasta.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Honey soy chicken rice
ingredients: 500g boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 large carrot, peeled and thinly sliced
steps: Rinse the rice thoroughly. In a medium saucepan, combine the rinsed rice and 3 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until all water is absorbed. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for 5 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
While the rice cooks, prepare the marinade. In a medium bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, honey, minced garlic, grated ginger, and sesame oil.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade, ensuring they are well coated. Let marinate for at least 15 minutes at room temperature, or up to 30 minutes in the refrigerator.

Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Remove the chicken from the marinade (reserving any excess marinade) and add it to the hot skillet. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is browned and cooked through.
Add the broccoli florets and sliced carrots to the skillet with the chicken. Cook for another 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender-crisp.

Pour the reserved marinade into the skillet with the chicken and vegetables. Bring to a simmer and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring, until the sauce thickens slightly and coats the chicken and vegetables.
Serve the honey soy chicken and vegetables immediately over the cooked rice. Garnish with sliced spring onions and sesame seeds.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Ginger chicken soup
ingredients: 1.5 lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into 1-inch pieces
2-inch piece fresh ginger, peeled and thinly sliced (about 1/4 cup)
1/4 tsp black pepper, or to taste
1 tbsp neutral cooking oil (like vegetable or canola)
steps: Step 1: Prepare all ingredients. Cut chicken thighs into 1-inch pieces. Peel and thinly slice the fresh ginger. Mince the garlic. Slice the green onions for garnish.

Step 2: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat 1 tbsp neutral cooking oil over medium heat. Add the sliced ginger and minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant, being careful not to burn the garlic.
Step 3: Add the chicken pieces to the pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.

Step 4: Pour in the chicken broth. Stir in the soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and tender.
Step 5: Taste the soup and adjust seasoning with more salt, pepper, or soy sauce if desired.
Step 6: Ladle the hot ginger chicken soup into bowls. Garnish each serving with sliced green onions before serving.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Greek yogurt lemon chicken
ingredients: 1.5 lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breasts
2 tbsp fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish, optional)
steps: Step 1: In a large bowl, combine the Greek yogurt, lemon juice, lemon zest, minced garlic, olive oil, dried oregano, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to create the marinade.

Step 2: Add the chicken thighs or breasts to the bowl, ensuring each piece is thoroughly coated with the marinade. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 4 hours, to allow the flavors to meld.
Step 3: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Lightly grease a baking dish or line it with parchment paper.
Step 4: Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess drip off, and arrange it in a single layer in the prepared baking dish. Discard any remaining marinade.

Step 5: Bake for 20-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C). For a slightly browned top, you can broil for the last 2-3 minutes, watching carefully to prevent burning.
Step 6: Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving. Garnish with fresh chopped parsley, if desired.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Spaghetti pomodoro
ingredients: 1/4 tsp black pepper, or to taste
1/4 cup fresh basil, chopped, plus more for garnish
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the spaghetti and cook according to package directions until al dente. Reserve about 1/2 cup of pasta water before draining.
While the pasta cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet or pot over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant, being careful not to burn it.

Pour in the crushed tomatoes. Season with salt and pepper. Bring the sauce to a gentle simmer, then reduce the heat to low and let it cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it thickens slightly.
Stir the chopped fresh basil into the tomato sauce.

Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it directly to the sauce. Toss well to coat the pasta evenly. If the sauce seems too thick, add a splash of the reserved pasta water to reach your desired consistency.
Serve immediately, garnished with extra fresh basil.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Prosciutto appetizers
ingredients: 1/2 cantaloupe or honeydew melon, cut into 1-inch cubes or balled
1 cup small fresh mozzarella balls (bocconcini or ciliegine), drained
steps: Step 1: Prepare the melon by cutting it in half, scooping out the seeds, and then cutting the flesh into bite-sized cubes or using a melon baller to create spheres.
Step 2: Drain the small fresh mozzarella balls. Wash and dry the fresh basil leaves and cherry tomatoes (if using).

Step 3: To assemble each appetizer, take a slice of prosciutto and fold or roll it. Thread it onto a skewer, followed by a piece of melon, a mozzarella ball, and a fresh basil leaf. Add a cherry tomato if desired.
Step 4: Arrange the assembled skewers on a serving platter. If using, drizzle lightly with balsamic glaze just before serving.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Herb Crusted Salmon
ingredients: 4 (6 oz) salmon fillets, skin on or off
1 lemon, cut into wedges for serving
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Step 2: In a shallow dish, combine the panko breadcrumbs, parsley, dill, chives, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Drizzle with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and mix until the breadcrumbs are evenly coated.
Step 3: Pat the salmon fillets dry with paper towels. Brush the top of each fillet with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Step 4: Press the herb breadcrumb mixture firmly onto the top of each salmon fillet, ensuring an even coating.
Step 5: Place the crusted salmon fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Step 6: Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the salmon is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork, and the crust is golden brown.
Step 7: Serve immediately with fresh lemon wedges.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Cheesy potatoe gratin
ingredients: 2 lbs Yukon Gold or Russet potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced (about 1/8-inch thick)
1.5 cups shredded Gruyere or sharp cheddar cheese, divided
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly butter a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Step 2: In a medium saucepan, combine heavy cream, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and nutmeg (if using). Heat over medium heat until it just begins to simmer, then remove from heat.
Step 3: Arrange one-third of the sliced potatoes in an even layer in the prepared baking dish. Sprinkle with one-third of the shredded cheese.
Step 4: Repeat with another layer of potatoes and cheese. Finish with the remaining potatoes, then pour the warm cream mixture evenly over the potatoes.
Step 5: Cover the baking dish tightly with aluminum foil and bake for 40 minutes.
Step 6: Remove the foil, sprinkle the remaining cheese over the top, and continue to bake uncovered for another 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown and bubbly.
Step 7: Let the gratin rest for 10-15 minutes before serving to allow it to set.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Creamy Thai coconut chicken meatballs
ingredients: 2-3 tbsp red curry paste (adjust to taste)
steps: Step 1: **Prepare Meatballs:** In a large bowl, combine ground chicken, panko breadcrumbs, egg, 2 minced garlic cloves, 1 tbsp grated ginger, 1/4 cup chopped cilantro, and 1 tbsp fish sauce. Mix gently until just combined. Form into approximately 18-20 small meatballs.

Step 2: **Cook Meatballs:** Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add meatballs in a single layer (cook in batches if necessary) and brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes. Remove meatballs from skillet and set aside.

Step 3: **Sauté Aromatics:** In the same skillet, add another 1 tbsp olive oil if needed. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes. Add the remaining 2 minced garlic cloves and 1 tbsp grated ginger, and cook for another minute until fragrant.

Step 4: **Build Sauce:** Stir in the red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly, until fragrant. Pour in the full-fat coconut milk and chicken broth, stirring to combine and scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Step 5: **Simmer Sauce:** Bring the sauce to a gentle simmer. Stir in 1 tbsp fish sauce, 1 tbsp brown sugar, and the juice of 1 lime. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.

Step 6: **Combine and Finish:** Return the browned meatballs to the skillet with the sauce. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until meatballs are cooked through and the sauce has slightly thickened.
Step 7: **Serve:** Garnish with fresh cilantro. Serve hot, optionally over steamed rice or noodles.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Crispy eggplant snitzel
steps: Slice eggplant into 1/4 to 1/2 inch thick rounds or oval slices. Lay them on paper towels, sprinkle with 1/2 tsp salt, and let sit for 15-30 minutes to draw out moisture. Pat dry thoroughly with paper towels.

Set up a breading station: In three separate shallow dishes, place: 1) all-purpose flour seasoned with a pinch of salt and pepper. 2) Whisked eggs with a pinch of salt and pepper. 3) Panko breadcrumbs seasoned with garlic powder, paprika (if using), remaining salt, and pepper.

Bread the eggplant: Dip each eggplant slice first into the flour, shaking off excess. Then dip into the egg mixture, letting excess drip off. Finally, coat thoroughly with breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere. Place breaded slices on a clean plate or baking sheet.
Heat oil: Heat about 1/2 to 1 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet or frying pan over medium-high heat until shimmering (around 350°F / 175°C).
Fry eggplant: Carefully place a few breaded eggplant slices into the hot oil, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan. Fry for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Drain: Remove fried eggplant with tongs or a slotted spoon and place on a wire rack set over paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges and fresh parsley, if desired.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Crme caramel
steps: Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). Place 4-6 ramekins (about 6 oz each) in a large baking dish.

To make the caramel: In a small saucepan, combine 1/2 cup granulated sugar and 2 tablespoons water. Cook over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves, then continue to cook without stirring until the syrup turns a deep amber color. Immediately pour the hot caramel into the bottom of each ramekin, swirling to coat the bottom.
To make the custard: In a medium bowl, whisk together the eggs and 1/2 cup granulated sugar until well combined but not frothy.
In a separate saucepan, heat the milk and vanilla extract over medium heat until it just begins to simmer around the edges (do not boil).
Gradually pour the hot milk into the egg mixture, whisking constantly to temper the eggs.
Strain the custard mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl or pitcher to remove any cooked egg bits or foam.
Carefully pour the strained custard over the caramel in the prepared ramekins.
Pour hot water into the baking dish around the ramekins, reaching about halfway up their sides (this creates a water bath or bain-marie).
Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until the custards are just set but still slightly wobbly in the center when gently shaken. A knife inserted near the edge should come out clean.
Carefully remove the ramekins from the water bath and let them cool completely on a wire rack.
Once cool, cover each ramekin with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight, to chill thoroughly.

To serve, run a thin knife around the edge of each custard. Place a serving plate upside down over the ramekin, then invert the ramekin and plate together. The crème caramel should slide out, with the caramel sauce pooling around it.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Finish salmon soup
ingredients: 400-500g skinless, boneless salmon fillet, cut into 2-3 cm cubes
steps: Melt butter in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the sliced leek and sauté for 3-5 minutes until softened.
Add the sliced carrots and diced potatoes to the pot. Sauté for another 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the fish broth or water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Gently add the salmon cubes to the soup. Cook for 3-5 minutes, or until the salmon is just cooked through and flakes easily. Be careful not to overcook.
Stir in the heavy cream or cooking cream. Heat through for a minute or two, but do not bring to a rolling boil after adding the cream.
Season the soup with salt and white pepper to taste.
Stir in the fresh chopped dill just before serving.
Serve hot.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Prosciutto sushi style
steps: Rinse 1 cup sushi rice under cold water until the water runs clear. Drain well.

Combine rinsed rice and 1.5 cups water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for another 10 minutes.
While the rice cooks, prepare the sushi seasoning: In a small bowl, whisk together 2 tablespoons rice vinegar, 1 tablespoon sugar, and 1/2 teaspoon salt until the sugar and salt are dissolved.
Transfer the cooked rice to a large, shallow bowl or baking sheet. Pour the seasoning over the rice and gently fold with a rice paddle or spatula until well combined and cooled slightly.
Prepare the fillings: Slice 1 ripe avocado and 1/2 cucumber into thin strips. Soften 4 oz cream cheese.
Lay out a sheet of plastic wrap on a clean surface. Arrange 2-3 slices of prosciutto, slightly overlapping, to form a rectangle.
With wet hands, spread a thin, even layer of seasoned sushi rice over the prosciutto, leaving a small border at the top edge.
Along the bottom edge of the rice, place a line of softened cream cheese, then avocado strips and cucumber strips.
Using the plastic wrap, carefully roll the prosciutto and rice tightly from the bottom edge upwards, pressing gently to secure the roll.
Once rolled, remove the plastic wrap. Repeat with the remaining prosciutto, rice, and fillings.
Using a sharp, wet knife, slice each roll into 6-8 pieces. Garnish with black sesame seeds if desired, and serve immediately.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Banana cake
ingredients: 3 very ripe medium bananas, mashed (about 1 ½ cups)
½ cup unsalted butter, melted and cooled
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9x5 inch loaf pan or an 8x8 inch square pan.
Step 2: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon (if using).
Step 3: In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the mashed bananas, granulated sugar, melted butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract until well combined.
Step 4: Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients. Stir with a spatula until just combined. Do not overmix; a few lumps are okay.
Step 5: Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
Step 6: Bake for 50-65 minutes, or until a wooden skewer inserted into the center comes out clean. If using a loaf pan, it might take longer.
Step 7: Let the cake cool in the pan for 10-15 minutes before inverting it onto a wire rack to cool completely.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Garlic confit avocado
ingredients: Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
steps: Place peeled garlic cloves in a small, heavy-bottomed saucepan. Pour olive oil over the garlic, ensuring they are fully submerged. Add 1/4 teaspoon salt.
Place the saucepan over very low heat. The oil should barely simmer with tiny bubbles. Cook for 45-60 minutes, or until the garlic cloves are very tender and golden.
Remove from heat and let the garlic confit cool completely in the oil.
Halve the avocados, remove the pits, and scoop out the flesh onto serving plates or leave in their skins.
Spoon several confit garlic cloves and a drizzle of the infused olive oil over each avocado half.
Season with flaky sea salt and freshly ground black pepper before serving.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Go ju Chang chicken rice
ingredients: 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into 1-inch pieces
steps: Step 1: In a medium bowl, combine gochujang, soy sauce, honey or brown sugar, sesame oil, water or chicken broth, minced garlic, and grated ginger. Mix well to create the sauce.
Step 2: Heat cooking oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Step 3: Add the chicken pieces to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.

Step 4: Pour the prepared sauce over the chicken and onions. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Step 5: Remove from heat. Serve the Gochujang chicken immediately over hot cooked rice.
Step 6: Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds before serving.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Creamy white bean soup
ingredients: 2 (15-ounce) cans cannellini beans, rinsed and drained
1/2 cup heavy cream (or full-fat coconut milk for dairy-free)
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
steps: Step 1: Heat olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5-7 minutes.
Step 2: Add minced garlic and dried thyme, and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Step 3: Stir in vegetable broth and rinsed cannellini beans. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat and cook for 10-15 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Step 4: Carefully transfer about half of the soup to a blender, or use an immersion blender directly in the pot, and blend until smooth. Return blended soup to the pot (if using a regular blender).
Step 5: Stir in the heavy cream (or coconut milk) and fresh spinach. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until spinach is wilted.
Step 6: Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste. Serve hot.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Pad Thai
ingredients: 8 oz (225g) raw shrimp, peeled and deveined, or chicken breast, thinly sliced
4 oz (115g) firm tofu, pressed and diced
1/2 cup garlic chives (or green onions), cut into 1-inch pieces
1/4 cup roasted peanuts, crushed, for garnish
1 lime, cut into wedges, for serving
1 tbsp water (if needed to dissolve sugar)
steps: Step 1: Soak the rice noodles in hot water for 15-20 minutes, or until pliable but still firm. Drain well and set aside.
Step 2: In a small bowl, whisk together the tamarind paste, fish sauce, palm sugar, and water (if using) until the sugar is dissolved. Set aside.
Step 3: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat. Add the shrimp or chicken and cook until almost done, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from the wok and set aside.
Step 4: Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the wok. Add the diced tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes. Push the tofu to one side of the wok.
Step 5: Pour the beaten eggs into the empty side of the wok and scramble until just set. Break them into smaller pieces and mix with the tofu.
Step 6: Add the drained noodles to the wok. Pour the Pad Thai sauce over the noodles and toss everything together until the noodles are evenly coated and heated through, about 2-3 minutes.

Step 7: Return the cooked shrimp or chicken to the wok. Add 1.5 cups of the bean sprouts and the garlic chives. Toss quickly for about 1 minute, until the sprouts are slightly softened but still crunchy.
Step 8: Transfer the Pad Thai to serving plates. Garnish with the remaining fresh bean sprouts, crushed peanuts, and lime wedges. Serve immediately.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Lemon posset
steps: Step 1: Zest 2 lemons and juice all 4. Set aside.
Step 2: In a medium saucepan, combine the heavy cream and caster sugar.
Step 3: Heat gently over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sugar has completely dissolved. Do not boil yet.
Step 4: Once the sugar is dissolved, increase the heat slightly and bring the mixture to a rolling boil. Let it boil for exactly 3 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent scorching.
Step 5: Remove the saucepan from the heat.
Step 6: Stir in the lemon juice and lemon zest.
Step 7: Carefully pour the mixture into 4-6 small serving glasses, ramekins, or teacups.
Step 8: Allow to cool slightly at room temperature, then transfer to the refrigerator and chill for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight, until completely set.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Orange cake
steps: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9-inch round cake pan or an 8x8 inch square pan.
Step 2: In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
Step 3: Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the orange zest and vanilla extract.
Step 4: In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.

Step 5: Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, alternating with the orange juice and milk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Step 6: Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and spread evenly.
Step 7: Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a wooden skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
Step 8: Let the cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes before inverting it onto a wire rack to cool completely.
Step 9: (Optional glaze) In a small bowl, whisk together the powdered sugar and 2-3 tablespoons of fresh orange juice until smooth. Drizzle over the cooled cake before serving.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Oxtail soup
ingredients: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
2 large potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes (optional)
1/2 cup fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish
steps: Step 1: Pat oxtail dry with paper towels and season generously with salt and black pepper.
Step 2: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven or heavy-bottomed pot over medium-high heat. Sear the oxtail pieces in batches until well browned on all sides. Remove oxtail and set aside.
Step 3: Add chopped onion, carrots, and celery to the pot. Sauté for 5-7 minutes until softened. Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Step 4: If using, pour in the red wine and scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot with a wooden spoon. Let it simmer for 2-3 minutes until slightly reduced.
Step 5: Return the seared oxtail to the pot. Add beef broth, water, diced tomatoes (with their juice), bay leaves, dried thyme, and Worcestershire sauce (if using). Bring to a boil.
Step 6: Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 3 to 4 hours, or until the oxtail is very tender and easily pulls away from the bone. Stir occasionally.
Step 7: If using, add the cubed potatoes during the last hour of cooking. Continue to simmer until potatoes are tender.
Step 8: Remove bay leaves. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed. Ladle into bowls and garnish with fresh chopped parsley before serving.

recipes.title: Instapot braised pork belly
ingredients: 2 lbs pork belly, skin on or off, cut into 1.5-2 inch cubes
steps: Cut the pork belly into 1.5-2 inch cubes.

Set the Instant Pot to Sauté mode. Add vegetable oil. Once hot, add the pork belly cubes in a single layer (you may need to do this in batches) and sear until browned on all sides, about 3-5 minutes per side. Remove the pork belly and set aside.
Drain most of the fat from the pot, leaving about 1-2 tablespoons. Add the minced garlic and sliced ginger to the pot and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Deglaze the pot with Shaoxing wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Return the seared pork belly to the Instant Pot. Add the soy sauce, brown sugar, star anise, cinnamon stick, and water or chicken broth. Ensure the liquid covers about 2/3 of the pork.
Close the lid and set the vent to Sealing. Select the Pressure Cook (or Manual) setting on High Pressure for 35 minutes.
Once cooking is complete, allow for a Natural Pressure Release for 10-15 minutes, then carefully quick release any remaining pressure.

Open the lid. If the sauce is too thin, remove the pork belly and set the Instant Pot to Sauté mode. Simmer the sauce for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it thickens to your desired consistency.
Return the pork belly to the thickened sauce. Garnish with chopped scallions before serving.

recipes.title: Orange glazed salmon
ingredients: 1 tbsp fresh parsley or cilantro, chopped (for garnish, optional)
steps: Step 1: In a small bowl, whisk together the orange juice, soy sauce, honey, minced garlic, and grated ginger. Set aside.
Step 2: Pat the salmon fillets dry with paper towels. Season both sides with salt and black pepper.
Step 3: Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add the salmon fillets skin-side down (if skin-on). Cook for 4-5 minutes until the skin is crispy and golden.
Step 4: Flip the salmon fillets. Pour the orange glaze over the salmon. Reduce heat to medium-low.

Step 5: Let the salmon simmer in the glaze for another 5-7 minutes, spooning the glaze over the fillets occasionally, until the salmon is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork, and the glaze has thickened slightly.
Step 6: Remove salmon from the skillet. Garnish with fresh orange zest and chopped parsley or cilantro, if desired. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Chicken with lemon anchovies sauce
ingredients: 2 boneless, skinless chicken breasts (about 1.5 lbs total)
steps: Step 1: Pat chicken breasts dry and season lightly with salt and pepper.

Step 2: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken breasts and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through. Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.

Step 3: Reduce heat to medium. Add minced garlic and chopped anchovy fillets to the skillet. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until garlic is fragrant and anchovies have dissolved into a paste.
Step 4: Pour in the chicken broth and lemon juice, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, allowing the sauce to reduce slightly.
Step 5: Stir in the capers and lemon zest. Return the cooked chicken breasts to the skillet, spooning the sauce over them.
Step 6: Cook for another 1-2 minutes to heat the chicken through and allow it to absorb the flavors. Stir in the fresh parsley just before serving.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Pistachios ice cream
steps: If pistachios are not blanched, blanch them in boiling water for 1 minute, then drain and peel off skins. Toast peeled pistachios lightly in a dry pan over medium heat for 5 minutes until fragrant. Let cool, then finely grind them in a food processor until a paste forms.

In a medium saucepan, combine whole milk, heavy cream, and half (75g) of the granulated sugar. Heat over medium heat until simmering, stirring occasionally. Add the ground pistachio paste, stir well, remove from heat, cover, and let steep for 30 minutes.
In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the egg yolks, remaining half (75g) of the granulated sugar, and salt until light and creamy.

Reheat the pistachio-infused milk mixture over medium-low heat until warm. Slowly ladle about 1/2 cup of the hot milk mixture into the egg yolk mixture, whisking constantly to temper the yolks. Gradually pour the tempered egg mixture back into the saucepan with the remaining milk mixture, whisking continuously.
Cook the custard over medium-low heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until the mixture thickens enough to coat the back of the spoon (about 170-175°F or 77-79°C). Do not boil.
Immediately strain the custard through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl to remove any pistachio solids and ensure a smooth texture. Stir in vanilla extract and almond extract (if using).

Cover the bowl with plastic wrap, pressing it directly onto the surface of the custard to prevent a skin from forming. Chill thoroughly in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight, until completely cold.
Once chilled, pour the custard into an ice cream maker and churn according to the manufacturer's instructions until it reaches a soft-serve consistency.
Transfer the churned ice cream to an airtight container and freeze for at least 2-4 hours, or until firm, before serving.

recipes.title: Creamy spinach and crispy chicken
steps: Pat chicken thighs dry with paper towels. Season both sides with salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook for 6-8 minutes per side, or until golden brown, crispy, and cooked through (internal temperature 165°F/74°C). Remove chicken from skillet and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium. Add butter to the same skillet. Once melted, add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add fresh spinach to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
Stir in softened cream cheese, heavy cream, and chicken broth. Cook, stirring constantly, until the cream cheese is fully melted and the sauce is smooth and creamy.
Stir in the grated Parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Return the crispy chicken to the skillet, nestling it into the creamy spinach sauce. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Greek meatballs
steps: Step 1: In a large bowl, combine the ground beef or lamb, chopped onion, minced garlic, breadcrumbs, egg, chopped mint, chopped parsley, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients gently with your hands until just combined. Be careful not to overmix, as this can make the meatballs tough.
Step 3: Form the mixture into small, uniform meatballs, about 1-inch (2.5 cm) in diameter.
Step 4: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Step 5: Add the meatballs to the hot skillet in batches, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan. Cook, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 8-12 minutes per batch.
Step 6: Remove cooked meatballs from the skillet and serve hot, optionally with tzatziki, pita bread, or a lemon wedge.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Peach salad
ingredients: 5 oz (about 5 cups) fresh arugula or mixed greens
steps: Step 1: Prepare the dressing. In a small bowl, whisk together the extra virgin olive oil, fresh lime juice, honey (or maple syrup), salt, and black pepper until well combined. Set aside.
Step 2: Prepare the peaches. Wash, pit, and slice the ripe peaches into wedges or bite-sized pieces.
Step 3: Assemble the salad. In a large serving bowl, combine the fresh arugula (or mixed greens), sliced peaches, crumbled feta cheese, and toasted pecans (or walnuts).
Step 4: Dress and serve. Drizzle the prepared dressing over the salad ingredients. Gently toss to combine all ingredients evenly. Serve immediately.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Lemon miso kale soup
ingredients: 1 bunch kale (about 5-6 oz), stems removed and leaves chopped
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
steps: Step 1: Heat olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5-7 minutes.
Step 2: Add minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot and cook for another 1 minute until fragrant.
Step 3: Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a simmer.
Step 4: Add the chopped kale to the pot. Cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the kale is tender.
Step 5: While the kale cooks, in a small bowl, whisk the miso paste with about 1/2 cup of the warm broth from the pot until smooth.
Step 6: Remove the pot from the heat. Stir the dissolved miso mixture and fresh lemon juice into the soup.
Step 7: Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste. Serve hot.
recipes.notes: Details pending transcription from Instagram post.

recipes.title: Thai chicken rice
ingredients: 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breasts
3 cloves garlic, minced (1 for rice, 2 for sauce)
1-2 red chilies, thinly sliced (or 1/2 tsp chili flakes)
steps: Step 1: Rinse jasmine rice under cold water until the water runs clear. Drain well.

Step 2: In a medium saucepan, combine the rinsed rice, chicken broth, 1 slice of fresh ginger, and 1 minced garlic clove. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Once boiling, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-18 minutes, or until all liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for 5 minutes, then fluff with a fork.

Step 3: While the rice cooks, prepare the chicken. Place chicken thighs or breasts in a pot and cover with water or additional chicken broth. Bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat, then reduce heat to low and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through (internal temperature reaches 165°F/74°C). Remove chicken from the liquid, let cool slightly, then slice or shred.

Step 4: Prepare the sauce: In a small bowl, combine soy sauce, dark soy sauce (if using), rice vinegar, sugar, grated ginger, the remaining 2 minced garlic cloves, sliced red chilies, and lime juice. Stir well until the sugar dissolves.
Step 5: To serve, spoon the cooked rice onto plates. Arrange the sliced chicken next to the rice. Garnish with thinly sliced cucumber and fresh cilantro. Drizzle generously with the prepared sauce.

recipes.title: Braised short rib
ingredients: 1.5 cups dry red wine (e.g., Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot)
steps: Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). Pat short ribs dry with paper towels and season generously with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot over medium-high heat. Sear the short ribs on all sides until deeply browned, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove ribs from the pot and set aside.
Add chopped onion, carrots, and celery to the pot. Sauté until softened, about 8-10 minutes. Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Pour in the red wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, allowing the wine to reduce slightly.
Stir in the beef broth, bay leaves, and fresh thyme. Bring the liquid to a simmer.
Return the seared short ribs to the pot, ensuring they are mostly submerged in the liquid. If not, add a little more broth or water.
Cover the Dutch oven tightly and transfer to the preheated oven. Braise for 2.5 to 3 hours, or until the short ribs are fork-tender and easily pull away from the bone.
Carefully remove the pot from the oven. Remove the short ribs from the pot and set aside on a plate, tented with foil. Discard bay leaves and thyme sprigs.
Skim off any excess fat from the surface of the braising liquid. If desired, you can reduce the sauce further on the stovetop over medium-high heat until it reaches your desired consistency.
Serve the braised short ribs with the rich sauce.
